_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Paper
author: parker@pterodactyl.io
description: High performance Spigot fork that aims to fix gameplay and mechanics inconsistencies.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# MCJars API Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

apt update && apt install curl jq unzip -y

VERSION=${VERSION:-latest}
BUILD=${BUILD:-latest}

if [ "$VERSION" == "latest" ]; then
    VERSION=$(curl -s "https://versions.mcjars.app/api/v2/builds/$SOFTWARE" | jq -r '.builds | to_entries | map(select(.value.type == "RELEASE")) | last | .key')
fi

if [ "$BUILD" == "latest" ]; then
    BUILD=$(curl -s "https://versions.mcjars.app/api/v1/builds/$SOFTWARE/$VERSION/latest" | jq -r '.build.id')
fi

echo "Software: $SOFTWARE"
echo "Version: $VERSION"
echo "Build: $BUILD"

bash <(curl -s "https://versions.mcjars.app/api/v1/script/$BUILD/bash")

# Pull optimized configs for Paper-based servers
if [ "$SOFTWARE" != "VANILLA" ] && [ "$SOFTWARE" != "FABRIC" ] && [ "$SOFTWARE" != "FORGE" ]; then
    echo "Fetching optimized Paper configs..."
    CONFIG_BASE="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/elitestarhosting/yolks/main/configs/paper"
    curl -sSL "$CONFIG_BASE/bukkit.yml" -o /mnt/server/bukkit.yml
    curl -sSL "$CONFIG_BASE/spigot.yml" -o /mnt/server/spigot.yml
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/config
    curl -sSL "$CONFIG_BASE/paper-global.yml" -o /mnt/server/config/paper-global.yml
    curl -sSL "$CONFIG_BASE/paper-world-defaults.yml" -o /mnt/server/config/paper-world-defaults.yml
    echo "Configs applied!"
fi

echo "DONE !!"

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description:
The version of minecraft to download. 

Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run the server with.

variables.name: Download Path
variables.description: A URL to use to download a server.jar rather than the ones in the install script. This is not user viewable.

variables.name: Build Number
variables.description:
The build number for the paper release.

Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.
